creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
I see the fetch failed on most of my builders.
But on a few machine it succeeds.
It seems IP-Address does matter as well.

fetch -v https://www.clamav.net/downloads/production/clamav-0.104.1.tar.gz
